description: Baseline Infrastructure as Code requirements ensuring all infrastructure is defined, versioned, linted, and deployed consistently through code-based definitions.

requirements.text: IaC definitions exist for all deployed infrastructure (servers, databases, networking, storage, etc.)
requirements.intent: All infrastructure must be reproducible from code
requirements.verifiable_by: List all deployed resources; confirm each has corresponding IaC code

requirements.text: Single deploy entrypoint (make/script) documented in README explaining how to bootstrap and deploy infrastructure
requirements.intent: Deployment must be automatable and not require manual steps
requirements.verifiable_by: Follow the documented entrypoint; confirm infrastructure deploys successfully

requirements.text: IaC files pass formatting checks (terraform fmt / equivalent) enforced via pre-commit or CI
requirements.intent: Code must be consistently formatted for readability
requirements.verifiable_by: Run formatting check tool; confirm all IaC files conform

requirements.text: IaC linter runs in CI (tflint / equivalent) and blocks deployment on errors
requirements.intent: IaC must be validated for correctness and best practices
requirements.verifiable_by: Introduce intentional linter error in IaC; confirm CI blocks the deployment

requirements.text: CI validates IaC on every PR (plan/preview, not just apply) and shows diff to reviewers
requirements.intent: Infrastructure changes must be reviewed before deployment
requirements.verifiable_by: Open PR with IaC change; confirm CI shows plan output and diff in comments

requirements.text: No plaintext secrets in IaC — all secrets use secret manager references (AWS Secrets Manager, HashiCorp Vault, etc.)
requirements.intent: Credentials must never appear in code or state files
requirements.verifiable_by: Scan IaC code and state files for plaintext secrets; confirm none found

requirements.text: Environment separation (dev/staging/prod) implemented via workspaces or separate IaC configurations with different variables
requirements.intent: Environments must be isolated to prevent cross-contamination
requirements.verifiable_by: Deploy to dev environment; confirm prod resources are not affected

requirements.text: Remote state backend configured with locking (S3 with DynamoDB, Terraform Cloud, etc.) to prevent concurrent modifications
requirements.intent: State must be safely shared and protected from concurrent writes
requirements.verifiable_by: Attempt concurrent apply operations; confirm locking prevents corruption

requirements.text: Reusable modules for repeated patterns (networking, compute, databases) to reduce duplication and improve maintainability
requirements.intent: Infrastructure patterns must be DRY and composable
requirements.verifiable_by: Identify repeated infrastructure patterns; confirm they use shared modules

requirements.text: Infrastructure changes require pull request review and approval before apply
requirements.intent: All infrastructure modifications must be reviewed for safety and correctness
requirements.verifiable_by: Attempt to apply IaC change without PR review; confirm it is blocked

requirements.text: Provider and module versions are pinned to exact version or minor version range (e.g., ~> 1.2.0) to ensure reproducibility
requirements.intent: Version constraints must prevent breaking provider/module updates
requirements.verifiable_by: Check IaC code for version constraints; confirm they are specified

requirements.text: IaC README documents architecture, input variables, outputs, and step-by-step bootstrap process
requirements.intent: Infrastructure must be understandable and reproducible by team members
requirements.verifiable_by: Follow the README steps on a fresh machine; confirm infrastructure deploys successfully
